text: The Navigator API (`window.navigator` / `navigator`) provides information about the browser and device. Key properties include `userAgent`, `language`, `onLine`, `platform`, `hardwareConcurrency`, and access to various sub-APIs (`geolocation`, `clipboard`, `mediaDevices`).

The Navigator API (`window.navigator` / `navigator`) provides information about the browser and device. Key properties include `userAgent`, `language`, `onLine`, `platform`, `hardwareConcurrency`, and access to various sub-APIs (`geolocation`, `clipboard`, `mediaDevices`).
